hero.badge: The companion that keeps you in practice
hero.subtitle: Your space to study, practice and transform your life from within. Conversations with masters, guided scenes, complete library, unique workshops and a book you write yourself.

about.title: Designed for your practice
about.subtitle: A space to study, practice, converse and turn your process into your own book.
about.pillar1Desc: Lectures, books and metaphysical bible from Neville Goddard.
about.pillar2Desc: Guided plans of 7, 15 and 30 days with the Coach.
about.pillar3Desc: Personal journal and memory that persists between sessions.
about.pillar4Desc: Turn your process into your own book.
about.tagline: Made with love for your practice

features.title: Everything you need in one place
features.subtitle: Each tool connected to the others. With memory.
features.block1Desc: The Coach and Narrator work together to guide your practice, while the Metaphysical Bible and Plans sustain your process.
features.f1Desc: Work your desire with direct guidance. Return to your chosen state, step by step.
features.f2Desc: Vivid explanations, examples and guided scenes to truly understand.
features.f3Desc: Understand biblical symbols as states of consciousness.
features.f4Desc: 7, 15 or 30-day practices to sustain your desire.
features.block2Desc: Save what matters. Your process is saved so each session continues where you left off.
features.f5Desc: Real cases of people who applied the law of imagination.
features.f6Desc: Save what matters and pick up easily. Don't start from scratch each time.
features.f8Desc: Turn your ideas and learnings into chapters of your own book.

blog.title: From the Odiseo blog
blog.subtitle: Reflections, concepts and guides on the law of imagination.
blog.post1Desc: How Neville Goddard's central technique can transform your relationship with desire.
blog.post2Desc: Understanding self-concept as the starting point of all manifestation.
blog.post3Desc: Stories of people who applied conscious imagination and transformed their lives.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: What people ask us most about Odiseo.
faq.a1: Odiseo is a platform to study and practice imagination. It has an assistant, scene creator, source library, testimonials and more.
faq.q3: Do I need to know who Neville Goddard is?
faq.a3: No. Odiseo guides you from scratch, explaining each concept with examples and scenes.
faq.q4: Does the Coach remember my conversations?
faq.a4: Yes. The Coach saves your desire, your scene and your progress so each session continues where you left off.

talleres.title: What changes is not what you do. It's how you see yourself.
talleres.subtitle: 4 current workshops and 8 new workshops coming during the year. Real conversations between Germán González and Taty Baldi about what no book will tell you.
talleres.taller1Desc: The starting point that changes everything. Learn what it truly means to assume a desire as fulfilled, why feeling is everything, and how to start a daily practice that works. No detours, no empty theory.
talleres.taller2Desc: The leap most people never take. Germán and Taty show you how to build scenes that feel real, how to hold the state when nothing changes outside, and why persistence is not effort but faith.
talleres.taller3Desc: The deepest work. Because imagining isn't enough if you still feel like the same person. This workshop goes to the core: who you believe you are, how that image formed, and how to replace it with the version of you that already has what you desire.
talleres.taller4Desc: For those who want to go further. Neville's mystical teachings on the Promise, biblical symbols as maps of the soul, and imagination as the only God that exists. A workshop that expands what you thought was possible.
talleres.facilitadoresDesc: Two practitioners who don't teach from books but from life. The annual plan includes the 4 current workshops and 8 new workshops coming during the year.
talleres.ctaNote: Included in the annual plan · 4 current + 8 coming · $47 USD

footer.newsletterDesc: Odiseo news, articles and resources sent to your inbox.
footer.brandDesc: Your imagination companion to study, practice and turn your process into your own book.

creador.title: Scene Creator
creador.subtitle: Live a moment of your desire already fulfilled
creador.greeting: Hi. To create your scene with as much detail as possible, tell me: who is with you in this scene (if anyone, what is their name?), what place or space are you in, and what atmosphere or weather is there?
creador.inputPlaceholder: Tell me the details of your scene...
